title: Teachers: Send us your feedback on the Teacher and Youth Web Corner - Canada.ca
content:
## Teachers: Send us your feedback on the Teacher and Youth Web Corner
We created the Teacher and Youth Web Corner to provide students with fun, interactive games where they can learn about Canada, and to provide teachers with resources for use in the classroom.
We want you to tell us how we are doing.
- Are you able to find the information you are looking for?
- Are the materials useful and relevant to your classroom activities?
- Is there anything we could do better?
Please let us know your thoughts by sending an email to promotion@cic.gc.ca .
